_comment: Example OpenClaw cron schedule for Nujie. Replace the <PLACEHOLDERS> with real values from your Telegram bot setup. Drop into ~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json and restart OpenClaw.

payload.message: Good morning. Read workspace/HEARTBEAT.md from your local filesystem (next to AGENTS.md) and follow today's branch. Skills are in workspace/skills/. Do not search Notion for these files.
It's Friday calibration time. Read workspace/HEARTBEAT.md from your local filesystem and run the Friday calibration branch. Skills are in workspace/skills/.
